creator: p5B2EA84B3@t-online.de
text:
Closing this PR with a "works as intended" is a not so good style of communication. This is like making a law that prevents to call this a bug.

https://reviews.freebsd.org/D23100

As long as a Rust-canary is needed this is a bug and it keeps being a bug.

Either Rust has a problem or FreeBSD ports have a problem with Rust. I want to learn what exactly the problem is and why it could not be fixed since years. 

We should not get used to deny the existence of problems. It might be just enable an attack vector.
